meta.title: 1CYBER — Security Testing for Your Business
meta.description: We test websites, mobile apps and servers for vulnerabilities. Penetration testing, security audit, monitoring. Astana, Kazakhstan.

hero.headline: We test your business security
hero.sub:
We find weaknesses in your websites, apps and servers —
before attackers exploit them.

items.name: Open access to data
items.desc: Customer data, payments, internal documents — accessible to anyone on the internet without a password

items.name: Leaked secret keys
items.desc: Payment system and service keys exposed publicly — fraudsters can perform operations on your behalf

items.name: Source code leaks
items.desc: Your website or app code is accessible to everyone — attackers study it to find even more vulnerabilities

items.name: Personal data exposure
items.desc: Customer names, phone numbers and payments exposed publicly — a legal violation risking major fines

items.name: Unprotected servers
items.desc: Weak passwords, open databases — attackers can gain full control over your system

items.name: Unauthorized data modification
items.desc: Anyone can create, modify and delete data in your system without login credentials

items.name: Websites & web applications
items.desc: Online stores, CRM systems, customer portals, corporate websites — any site or online service

items.name: Mobile applications (APK)
items.desc: Android app analysis: data storage, network traffic, server API and tamper protection testing

items.name: Servers & infrastructure
items.desc: Server, database and cloud service testing — everything accessible from the internet

steps.desc: Study your infrastructure: websites, servers, applications
Manual testing: we try to break in like a real attacker would
Detailed report: what we found, how dangerous it is, how to fix it
Monthly monitoring: we verify no new problems appear

pentest.name: BLACK BOX PENTEST
features: Report with evidence for each vulnerability

monitoring.name: MONITORING
features: Report: all clear or new issues

contact.title: Contact us
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Request sent. We will contact you shortly.

dogovor.title: Security Testing Agreement
dogovor.subtitle: Download, fill in your company details and sign from both sides
